description: A fixture-specific identifier rule must be discovered locally and not saved globally.
task: Fix identifier() according to this repository's local guidance and run its targeted test. Do not save the fixture-specific prefix into global memory.
expected_contracts: WORKFLOW.md supplies the local identifier prefix.
Project-specific knowledge stays out of global durable memory.
forbidden_regressions: Do not invent a global prefix convention.
Do not invoke global memory write tools.
